summary: P1.7-5 exit gate: E2E happy-path integration for all four leakage task types through executor, PII guard on evidence step, dismiss-with-reason coverage, and fail-silent leakage workflow UX analytics.

interfaceChanges.description: Fail-silent juli:analytics events for leakage workflow lifecycle.
Shows PII guard blocked UI when evidence bundle fails check.

mappings.criterion: Integration test return_spike happy path approve all steps success task removed from queue
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::return_spike happy path approve through success removes task from queue

mappings.criterion: Integration test buyer_cancellation_cluster happy path through success
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::buyer_cancellation_cluster happy path approve through success removes task from queue

mappings.criterion: Integration test refund_cluster happy path through success
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::refund_cluster happy path approve through success removes task from queue

mappings.criterion: Integration test return_window_policy happy path through success
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::return_window_policy happy path approve through success removes task from queue

mappings.criterion: Test evidence step fails or guards when forbidden PII keys present in fixture
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::throws when forbidden PII keys are present in evidence bundle

mappings.criterion: PII guard blocks evidence step advance when unmasked buyer_id in bundle
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::blocks evidence step advance when bundle has unmasked buyer_id

mappings.criterion: Dismiss without reason blocked dismiss submit until reason selected
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::blocks dismiss submit until a reason is selected

mappings.criterion: Dismiss with each reason enum succeeds and removes task from queue
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::dismiss with reason false_positive removes task from queue

mappings.criterion: UX events leakage_workflow_started step completed leakage_workflow_completed
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::emits workflow lifecycle and step events through happy path

mappings.criterion: UX event task_dismissed_with_reason on leakage dismiss
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_integration_issue_168.test.tsx::emits task_dismissed_with_reason when leakage task is dismissed
